feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dump in Difference Analyzer when posting differences with serial numbers
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have a problem with a specific case when I post an inventory difference in Difference Analyzer:

We make an inventory of a specific storage bin. The storage bin only has units of a specific product wich is subject to serial numbers with type "C" serialization (Serialization in Stock, updated at storage bin level). 

There are 12 unit of the product at the storage bin. We count the inventory by entering 12 units in quantity, but on the serial numbers tab we change one serial number from our storage bin to one that is stored in another storage bin with another stock type (different storage locations in IM). The system shows a warning message with the text "Serial number 100000000000007 has already been assigned to storage bin 1A063". We count and post the inventory. 

Finally we go to Difference Analyzer to post the inventory differences. We introduce the product and the system shows two differences with red status:

If we try to post one of the differences, the system shows a error message with the text "Product is subject to serial number".

In the second difference, if we try to post the negative item the system shows us an error message with the text "Stock data of serial number 100000000000007 not suitable for movement". If we try to post the other item, the system shows the next dump:

If we try to post the item of the first difference, the system shows the same dump.

Can you help me with this issue?

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Destinaiton storage BIN for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

is there any option to confirm pick task automatically or any schedule run is available to confirm the pick task, in our case we are creating outbound delivery and Pick task creation everything through mass scheduling run process but i don't find any mass run for confirm pick task.

entry.title: Update Termination during Putaway Warehouse Task Cancellation - Storage Type with Pallet Storage
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am testing the Putaway to a Storage Type with "Pallet Storage" behavior. Putaway Warehouse Task is getting created as expected and Bin Sectioning is happening correctly.

But when I try to cancel the Putaway Warehouse Task there is an express update termination failure with error "Storage bin 0070-01-02/1 does not exist in warehouse number DE01", but the Bin and section does exist. Please find screenshots below.

If any of you has faced this issue, please let me know how to get this fixed.

Thanks,

Hemant

entry.title: SAP EWM Stock management - Difference between GUID_STOCK and GUID_STOCK0
entry.content:
Hello all,

in some cases SAP will increase the stock counter (tech. STOCK_CNT) from the value 000000 to 000001, 000002, ... In that case the GUID_STOCK and the GUID_STOCK0 of the physical stock getting different. In case of having stock counter 000000, GUID_STOCK and GUID_STOCK are identically.

On the other hand the available quanties are all maintained with the GUID_STOCK0.

My question is, in which situation does SAP change the stock counter to a value 000001 or higher? 

Thank you very much!

Best regards,

Dominik

entry.title: Pick full HU quantity from bulk storage
entry.content:
Hello,

we set up a bulk storage with level of available quantity = Storage Bin.

Partial pallets are allowed.

 

Now we are doing the following test for staging in production.

There are two pallets of a product: One full pallet with 1.000 CAR and one partial pallet with 600 CAR.

In production we need 300 CAR of the product. If we execute /SCWM/STAGE a warehouse task about 300 CAR will be created.

When the forklift driver scans the HU with 600 CAR the system should suggest picking not only the required 300 CAR, but the full HU with 600 CAR.

Is this possible in standard?

We do not use packaging specifications.

Best regards

Julian

entry.title: Wave ist not created
entry.content:
Hello,

is did some config but my wave is not created / i don't get an ppf action in my outbound delivery order.

 

WPT = 2020 with

I have an condition record that shluld match. Stock is in 0030 Storage Type. I can create an WT.

 

furthermore:

  • Wave Type WT01
  • Wave Category C1
  • Auto Wave

     

  • Capa Profile Z1 (Max No Items 10 or in another try 1000000 weight)
  • Condition Table ZWAVE01 (active) with 2 fields
    • WME_LGNUM
    • WME_AAREA
  • Access Sequence
  • Condition Type
  • Determination Procedure
  • Assignment to Doc Type

     

  • condition maintenance group

    but still, PDO PPF Actions emtpy, should be filled, right?

    what can i ceck in regards to ppf

 

best regards

Patrick


edit:

after a while i changed the action profile back. in some how-to i found that i should change the action profile form /SCWM/PDO_01 to /SCWM/PDO_02 and i dod no question that.
After changing it back to _01 i have now a PPF action in my outbound delivery order.

 

BUT. with a red flag. No valid wave template could be found.

My wave template looks like this

what can be wrong here?

 

i modified also a bit for testing

edit2:

what worked in the end was another condition table who only considers the (whole) Warehouse No LGNUM for testing. That worked. So that means the condition with the Activity Area did not. Can anyone explain to me why? Stock is sitting is storage type 0030 with AA 0030, a WT in background would grab stock from there. But it seems as a condition it's to early..? Any thoughts on that?

entry.title: Serialization number in SAP EWM for production order inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are working on the harmonized serial numbers. Once production confirms the serial number is generated and during the GR we can see the numbers tagged to the product.

When we post GR for order inbound delivery is created and serial numbers are updated in the IBD and distributed to EWM.

Strange thing is we are unable to see those serial numbers inbound delivery and when we try to create serial number we are getting pop message product is not serialized.

Could you please help me if I am missing anything

entry.title: GI and GR Date list by Outbound Deliveries
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I've got a delivery list and i need to find their GR and GI dates. I need to measure distance in between the GI and GR dates of deliveries. Its not possible to find all of them checking one by one. How can i reach this kind of list ? 

For example:

Outbound Delivery - GI Date - GR Date

entry.title: SAP EWM
entry.content:
HI Good Day!, SAP EWM(MFS, PLC fully automated WH) :  I would like to explore about the error message Warehouse task created to access behind bin whereas Front bin already have pallet blocking and  throws error front bin occupied/blocked error. how to validate steps in /SCWM/ADHU before WT task creation to validate front bin details and move front HU some other storage bin process and then WT for behind Pallet to process automatically, our one uses MFS, PLC and fully automated. or else any other solution for this automatic internal transfer clear front bin block.

appreciate your valuable advise and solution, thank you!

entry.title: Warehouse Spare Parts SAP Mail Notification
entry.content:
Hello

I would like to ask if there is a way to link warehouse spare parts SAP with mail?

I would like SAP to send mail notification when we take 1 piece of the spare parts & to send how many stock still available.

 

Thank You.

entry.title: Flexible Batch Scan when entering count for PI Document in RF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

During the PI count by WO in RF, the user is directed to count material X, for a specific batch presented by the system.  The order of batches being presented causes the user to walk around the pallet searching for each batch to be scanned many times.  This causes inefficiencies with counting a material that is batch managed when multiple batches exist in the bin / on a physical pallet.  

Is there a standard configuration that allows user the the ability to scan the batches in the physical order found on the pallet? So, the user should be able to scan the batch of his choice or at least have the ability to skip the batch that is being proposed by the system and come back to counting it later. Thanks.

entry.title: Date of Manufacturing in SAP EWM Inbound delivery of a purchase order
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

If minimum remaining Shelf life data is maintained in the master data for of Batch managed product then system expects the DOM in the GR. If the shelf life data is not maintained then DOM is not expected in the delivery.

The problem is if the DOM is not maintained in /scwm/prdi then we get the Queue error.
I do not want to make the field as mandatory in delivery profile because for the products where Shelf life data is not maintained business do not want to enter the DOM.  

Is there a standard way to not allow GR posting until DOM is maintained if shelf life data is maintained in the master data ? or Is there a way to copy the GR date as DOM date if user do not enter the SLED in /scwm/prdi ?

Alternate solution can be to mark "Set Expiration Date Check" as "No Check" for mvt 101.

entry.title: Storage Bin is not getting blocked when PI document is created using Exception Code
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have configured to trigger Unplanned PI document when a specific Exception Code is used in RF Pick. I have checked the "Physical Inventory Block" Check box and yet the PI Block is not getting set when the document gets created.

entry.title: How can I use PMR with more than one storage locations?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

in order to seprate the stock in a AFS availabe for sale location and for production i want to create my psa's in a seperate storage location. And i want to use the new extended production integration with EWM PMR.

So i tried to set a a control cycle with staging indicator 5 and I wanted to set 2 storage locations

AFS -> 11P1 

so the material lies i a high rack and should be brought to production in another sloc. There the stock is safe and could not be sold thorugh a sales order / outboudn delivery due to ATP/picking location settings.

 

But: system does not allow this setup, even if both slocs are ewm managed under the same warehouse number.

 

any idea how to achive the scenario anyways?

 

 

br, doepat

entry.title: PO for inter-company repair and return process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please help with the types of PO to be used for inter-company repair and return process, apart from CCSTO/SSTO(NBA type: C and D). Material-A being shipped from one plant to another plant for repair, in the return Material number has been change to B (Unit price vary) due to configuration requirements and this is affecting financial on repair plant. So we thought of sending the material for repair through PR and PO process. since same equipment number need to be returned back to origin upon repair completion,  it is difficult to identify the difference between regular buying-PO and R&R-PO. So we need your expert advise the right process to follow.

entry.title: Do I need to map new SD Routes also in EWM in an embedded System?
entry.content:
Hello,

Do I need to map new SD Routes also in EWM in an embedded System? I know there is an customizing for external decentral ewm but are there any settings in case ov an embedded system?

thx

br

doepat

entry.title: EWM - Picking WT creation fails due lack of stock
entry.content:
Hi All,

In WH monitor I see the stock existing for a product and batches assigned to it. While creating Picking WT, this stock is not considered and WT creation fails . It gives the messages that Batch restricted stock is not considered for the storage types. 

Can anyone please confirm, why batch stock is not considered although batch is given during WT creation. I tried with and without batch but it gives same error 'No Source bin found'

entry.title: SAP EWM Physical Inventory count sheet Print Automatically after PI Document Active
entry.content:
The PI Count Sheet is required to Print automatically once the Physical Inventory Document is Active. The PPF Action is maintained with Action Profile /SCWM/PI_COUNT, but Printing is only possible manually via Transaction /SCWM/PRPI_DOC or Print Button in /SCWM/PI_PROCESS.

Thanks in Advance for the Solution.

entry.title: Handling Unit Label Printing Through PPF in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a business requirement to trigger the PPF HU for HU label print after the Goods receipt is posted. In standard, the HU gets printed immediately after the packing is done (HU is created and saved). Is there any way to trigger the PPF HU after GR is posted ?

Thank you for your help,

Regards,

entry.title: How to configure picking strategy M in storage type record?
entry.content:
Hi, SAP community,

What are the steps involved in configuring picking strategy "M" in storage type records? for small / large quantities.

Thanks!
